LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueHumanlike.questDescr: 任务描述->来自[asker_faction_name]的绝望信号已经在无线电静电中噼啪作响。他们的一名人民，[prisoner_nameDef]，被荒地掠夺者抓获，并被关押在一座戒备森严的奴隶营中。绑架者以残暴闻名，而时间已经不多了。在这位幸存者成为严酷荒原的又一个受害者之前，发起救援行动来解救他们。

questDescription->Intelligence from [asker_faction_name] reports that [prisoner_nameDef], a valued member of their community, has fallen into the hands of ruthless slavers. The raider camp is heavily defended, but the captive's knowledge of pre-war technology makes them too valuable to abandon. Infiltrate the compound and extract the prisoner before they're s老旧 to the highest bidder.
questDescription->来自 [asker_faction_name] 的一条紧急消息：“[prisoner_nameDef] 在补给运行出现问题时被抓获。抓获他们的袭击者是一个臭名昭著的奴隶行动的一部分，该行动一直在恐吓荒原。我们不能让我们自己的人在他们手中受苦。闯入他们的要塞老旧，并将 [prisoner_nameDef] 带回家。”
任务描述->来自[asker_faction_name]的紧急通讯：一名名为[prisoner_nameDef]的幸存者在他们的商队遭到伏击后被袭击者奴役。绑架者索要巨额赎金，同时让囚犯面临难以形容的条件。唯一的选择就是直接攻击他们的防御阵地。将这个无辜的灵魂从荒地噩梦中解放出来。

questDescription->Priority alert from [asker_faction_name]: [prisoner_nameDef], a skilled wasteland survivor, has been captured by a gang of violent raiders known for their slave trading operations. The prisoner's intimate knowledge of local settlements makes them both valuable and 危险 in enemy hands. Stage a rescue mission before this information can be extracted and used against innocent communities.
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueHumanlike.questNameR: 任务名称->囚犯自由行动
LanguageData.FCP_Quest_PawnRescueHumanlike.root.nodes: 你已经击败了战俘营！\n\n[asker_faction_name] 的付款已到。
这些殖民者参与了任务[resolvedQuestName]的胜利。 [asker_definite] 想知道谁应该获得此服务的 [royalFavorReward_amount] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel]。
